Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "idle"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK == 
  /\ participants \in FiniteSet
  /\ coordinator \in FiniteSet
  /\ messages \in FiniteSet
  /\ \A p \in participants: 
       /\ p \in FiniteSet
       /\ p \in messages
          => /\ p \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}
          /\ p = Prepare
             => /\ p \in messages
                /\ p \in {Commit, Abort}
          /\ p = VoteYes
             => /\ p \in messages
                /\ p \in {Commit, Abort}
          /\ p = VoteNo
             => /\ p \in messages
                /\ p \in {Abort}
          /\ p = Commit
             => /\ p \in messages
                /\ p \in {Abort}
          /\ p = Abort
             => /\ p \in messages
                /\ p \in {}

Init == 
  /\ participants = {}
  /\ coordinator = {}
  /\ messages = {}

Next == 
  \/ /\ participants' = participants \cup {p}
      /\ p \notin participants
      /\ coordinator' = coordinator
      /\ messages' = messages
  \/ /\ coordinator' = coordinator \cup {c}
      /\ c \notin coordinator
      /\ participants' = participants
      /\ messages' = messages
  \/ /\ messages' = messages \cup {Prepare}
      /\ Prepare \notin messages
      /\ participants' = participants
      /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  \/ /\ messages' = messages \cup {VoteYes}
      /\ VoteYes \notin messages
      /\ participants' = participants
      /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  \/ /\ messages' = messages \cup {VoteNo}
      /\ VoteNo \notin messages
      /\ participants' = participants
      /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  \/ /\ messages' = messages \cup {Commit}
      /\ Commit \notin messages
      /\ participants' = participants
      /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  \/ /\ messages' = messages \cup {Abort}
      /\ Abort \notin messages
      /\ participants' = participants
      /\ coordinator' = coordinator

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = -1 means fork f is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
    \/ (* Philosopher p becomes hungry *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N : states[p] = "thinking"
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
    \/ (* Philosopher p picks up forks if both are free *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
            /\ states[p] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[p] = -1
            /\ forks[If p = 1 then N else p-1] = -1
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = p, ![If p = 1 then N else p-1] = p]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
    \/ (* Philosopher p puts down forks *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
            /\ states[p] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = -1, ![If p = 1 then N else p-1] = -1]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, full, empty, x

Init == /\ queue = <<>>
        /\ full = FALSE
        /\ empty = TRUE

Next == 
  \/ /\ full = FALSE
     /\ \E x \in Nat : x \notin queue
        /\ x' \in Nat
        /\ x' \notin queue
        /\ queue' = Append(queue, <<x'>>)
        /\ full' = (Len(queue') = K)
        /\ empty' = FALSE
  \/ /\ empty = FALSE
     /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
     /\ full' = FALSE
     /\ empty' = (Len(queue') = 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, full, empty>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS ServerSet

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ [x \in ServerSet |-> x]
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

RequestVote == /\ state = Candidate
              /\ currentTerm = t
              /\ votedFor = None
              /\ votedFor' = s
              /\ state' = Follower
              /\ currentTerm' = t

VoteGranted == /\ state = Candidate
              /\ currentTerm = t
              /\ votedFor = None
              /\ votedFor' = s
              /\ state' = Follower
              /\ currentTerm' = t

VoteDenied == /\ state = Candidate
              /\ currentTerm = t
              /\ votedFor = s
              /\ state' = Follower
              /\ currentTerm' = t

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ VoteGranted
        \/ VoteDenied

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> ==
